zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Courtenay於1194年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內馬雷易爾--布利時，她的父親Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople35歲，母親Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople19歲。她和Heinrich I. von Vianden至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1270年7月17日在盧森堡梅爾圖塔馬利塔爾享年76歲，埋葬在盧森堡梅爾圖塔馬利塔爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Courtenay于1194年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內馬雷易爾--布利时，她的父亲Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople35岁，母亲Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople19岁。她和Heinrich I. von Vianden至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1270年7月17日在卢森堡梅爾圖塔馬利塔爾享年76岁，埋葬在卢森堡梅爾圖塔馬利塔爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Courtenay was born in 1194, in Mareuil-en-Brie, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople, was 35 and her mother, Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople, was 19. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Heinrich I. von Vianden. She died on 17 July 1270, in Marienthal, Tuntange, Mersch, Luxembourg, at the age of 76, and was buried in Marienthal, Tuntange, Mersch, Luxembourg.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Courtenay est née en 1194, à Mareuil-en-Brie, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Heinrich I. von Vianden. Elle est décédée le 17 juillet 1270, à Marienthal, Tuntange, Mersch, Luxembourg, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Marienthal, Tuntange, Mersch, Luxembourg.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Courtenay 1194 in Mareuil-en-Brie, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople 35 und ihre Mutter Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople 19. Sie hatte mit Heinrich I. von Vianden mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Juli 1270 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Marienthal, Tuntange, Mersch, Luxemburg und wurde in Marienthal, Tuntange, Mersch, Luxemburg begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Courtenay è nata il nel 1194 nel Mareuil-en-Brie, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Heinrich I. von Vianden. Morì il 17 luglio 1270, nel Marienthal, Tuntange, Mersch, Lussemburgo, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Marienthal, Tuntange, Mersch, Lussemburgo.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Courtenayが1194年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンマレウイル-エン-ブリーで生まれた時，父Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinopleは35歳，母Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinopleは19歳であった。彼女はHeinrich I. von Viandenとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1270年7月17日にルクセンブルクメルッシュトゥンタンッジマリーンサルで76歳で死去し，ルクセンブルクメルッシュトゥンタンッジマリーンサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Courtenay(이)가 1194년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 마우이--브리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Heinrich I. von Vianden(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1270년 7월 17일 룩셈부르크 머슈 툰탠지 마앵솔에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 룩셈부르크 머슈 툰탠지 마앵솔에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Courtenay nasceu em 1194, em Mareuil-en-Brie, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Heinrich I. von Vianden. Ela faleceu em 17 de julho de 1270, em Marienthal, Tuntange, Mersch, Luxemburgo, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Marienthal, Tuntange, Mersch, Luxemburgo.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Courtenay родилась в 1194 г. в местности мареуил-ен-бри, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Heinrich I. von Vianden. Она умерла 17 июля 1270 г. в местности мариентэл, тунтанг, мирщ, Люксембург в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности мариентэл, тунтанг, мирщ, Люксембург.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Courtenay nació en 1194, en Mareuil-en-Brie, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Heinrich I. von Vianden. Murió el 17 de julio de 1270, en Marienthal, Tuntange, Mersch, Luxemburgo, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Marienthal, Tuntange, Mersch, Luxemburgo.
